prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约6259名→6734名→6632名→6808名→8339名，整体呈波动后移趋势，尤其2025年较2024年后移约1531名，降幅明显；近5年累计后移约2080名，2025年基准位次约8339名；该校在天津市综合类招生计划2021–2024年均为68人，2025年增至70人，2026年进一步 增至74人，较2025年扩招约5.7%，扩招幅度温和，对竞争压力有一定缓解但作用有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华北电力大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2 025年第83名、2026年第84名，排名稳定，属于电力行业顶尖院校，行业认可度高；该校近年未出现明显负面舆情事件，抖音综合热度处于一般水平，短视频平 台曝光量不高；无投档线断档或暴跌记录，报考心理预期平稳；第五轮学科评估中，电气工程获评A级，动力工程及工程热物理获评A-级，均为能源电力领域核 心学科，与该校招生专业高度匹配，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2024年专业热度数据显示，电气工程及其自动化、能源动力类（推荐，66.43）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐，76.86）等核心专业社会热度持续偏高；天津市2026年高考报名总人数约82000人，较2025年约71938人增加约 14%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势（2025年基 准8339名）、2026年扩招约5.7%（缓解竞争）、天津市考生总数增加约14%（加剧竞争）以及电气类核心专业持续高热等因素，扩招与考生增加效应部分对冲后竞争仍趋加剧；预 测2026年最低录取位次约8685名，较2025年小幅后移约346名，区间8185–9185名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程及其自动化（北京校部）
- 智能电网信息工程（北京校部）
- 计算机科学与技术（北京校部）
- 通信工程（北京校部）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等难度）
- 自动化（北京校部）
- 能源与动力工程（北京校部）
- 核工程与核技术（北京校部）
- 信息与计算科学（北京校部）
- 氢能科学与工程（北京校部）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 法学（能源法治方向）（北京校部）
- 会计学（北京校部）
- 英语（能源电力国际化人才创新班）（北京校部）
- 网络与新媒体（北京校部）
- 行政管理（北京校部）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约8685名，区间8185–9185名。位次在区间下限（8185名）以内可重点冲刺一档电气类、计算机类王牌专业；位次在区间中段（8500–8800名）建议以二档能源动力、自 动化等专业为主，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（9185名）附近建议以三档专业保底，同时关注二档中位次相对友好的专业。电气工程及其自动化、智能电网信息工程为该校最 具竞争力的专业，学科评估A级且社会热度极高，报考热度持续攀升。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tianjin comprehensive category were approximately 6259 → 6734 → 6632 → 6808 → 8339, showing an overall fluctuating backward trend, especially in 2025 with a backward shift of about 1531 places compared to 2024, a significant decline; the cumulative backward shift over the past 5 years is about 2080 places, with a baseline ranking of about 8339 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Tianjin comprehensive category was 68 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 70 in 2025, and further increased to 74 in 2026, an expansion of about 5.7% compared to 2025, a moderate expansion that alleviates competition pressure but has limited effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranking 83rd in the 2025 Soft Science China University Rankings and 84th in 2026, with stable rankings. It is a top institution in the electric power industry with high industry recognition; in recent years, there have been no significant negative public opinion incidents, and its overall Douyin popularity is at an average level, with low exposure on short video platforms; there are no records of admission line drops or crashes, and the psychological expectations for applications are stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Electrical Engineering was rated A, and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics was rated A-, both core disciplines in the energy and electric power field, highly matching the university's enrollment majors, and strongly attractive to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2024 major popularity data shows that core majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Energy and Power (recommended, 66.43), and Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended, 76.86) continue to have high social popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Tianjin college entrance examination is about 82,000, an increase of about 14% compared to about 71,938 in 2025, with a significant expansion of the candidate pool and intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend of rankings (baseline 8339 in 2025), the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 5.7% (alleviating competition), the increase in total candidates in Tianjin by about 14% (intensifying competition), and the sustained high popularity of core electrical majors, the effects of expansion and candidate increase partially offset each other, but competition still intensifies; it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be about 8685, a slight backward shift of about 346 places compared to 2025, with a range of 8185–9185.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Beijing Campus)
- Smart Grid Information Engineering (Beijing Campus)
- Computer Science and Technology (Beijing Campus)
- Communication Engineering (Beijing Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate Difficulty)
- Automation (Beijing Campus)
- Energy and Power Engineering (Beijing Campus)
- Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology (Beijing Campus)
- Information and Computing Science (Beijing Campus)
- Hydrogen Energy Science and Engineering (Beijing Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Law (Energy Rule of Law Direction) (Beijing Campus)
- Accounting (Beijing Campus)
- English (Energy and Power International Talent Innovation Class) (Beijing Campus)
- Network and New Media (Beijing Campus)
- Administrative Management (Beijing Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 8685, range 8185–9185. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (8185) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 electrical and computer science flagship majors; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (8500–8800) are advised to mainly consider Tier 2 energy, power, and automation majors, while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (9185) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors with relatively friendly rankings. Electrical Engineering and Automation and Smart Grid Information Engineering are the most competitive majors at this university, with A-level discipline evaluations and extremely high social popularity, and application popularity continues to rise.
